title: MGN 90 (M+F)  (manual handling operations) regulations 1998
body: "Notice to all shipowners, operator and managers of merchant ships and fishing vessels, employers of those working on such vessels, masters, skippers, officers and crew.  This notice should be read in conjunction with the regulations above and with MGN 636 (M) amendment 3 and MGN 587 (F) amendment 1 and replaces MGN 90 (M+F) amendment 3 "
